---
title: "Projects"
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}

::: {.card style="background:#fff; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](images/project1.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
### Project 1
Short description of project 1.
:::

::: {.card style="background:#fff; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](images/project3.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
### Project 3
Short description of project 3.
:::

:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}

::: {.card style="background:#fff; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](images/project2.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
### Project 2
Short description of project 2.
:::

::: {.card style="background:#fff; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](images/project4.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
### Project 4
Short description of project 4.
:::

:::

::::
